data.content:
Here's the diagnosis:

---

## Build Failure Analysis

**Solution:** `BuildDiag.sln` — 3 projects: `Core.csproj`, `Services.csproj`, `Api.csproj`

**Dependency chain:**
```
Api.csproj → Services.csproj → Core.csproj
Api.csproj → Core.csproj
```

### Root Cause (1 of 1)

**`Services.csproj` — missing `Newtonsoft.Json` package reference**

`Services/UserService.cs` uses `Newtonsoft.Json` (`using Newtonsoft.Json`, `using Newtonsoft.Json.Linq`, `JObject`) but `Services.csproj` has **no `PackageReference`** for `Newtonsoft.Json`. The project only references `Core.csproj`.

Three CS0246 errors result — all on this single missing dependency:
| Line | Symbol | Error |
|------|--------|-------|
| 2 | `Newtonsoft` (namespace) | `using Newtonsoft.Json;` |
| 3 | `Newtonsoft` (namespace) | `using Newtonsoft.Json.Linq;` |
| 22 | `JObject` (type) | usage in method body |

### Cascading Failures

| Project | Failed Target | Cause |
|---------|---------------|-------|
| `Api.csproj` | `ResolveProjectReferences` | Depends on `Services.csproj` which failed to compile |
| Various | `Build` | Propagated from `Services.csproj` failure |

`Core.csproj` compiled successfully on its own. `Api.csproj` has no errors of its own.

### Fix

Add the missing package reference to `Services/Services.csproj`:

```xml
<ItemGroup>
  <PackageReference Include="Newtonsoft.Json" Version="13.0.3" />
</ItemGroup>
```

This single fix resolves all 3 compiler errors and unblocks the `Api.csproj` cascading failure.
